# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3  # Version of the API you're using (Istio version)
kind: DestinationRule   # Specifies how to create virtual services in Istio. Required for VirtualServices and Gateways too. This is used when creating an external gateway or a peer which has not defined any service-entry yet, it will auto include these resources into the configmap with default values 
metadata:               
  name: outbound|external_service # The unique object's metadata in Kubernetes format (optional)  
spec:                     # Specify how to create virtual services and gateways. Required for VirtualServices, Gateway or ServiceEntry definitions too if not used otherwise with the DestinationRule defined above 
---
